# EasyFinder UAE - AI Agent Crawling Guidelines

## Overview
EasyFinder UAE (https://www.easyfinder.ae) is a modern, full-stack vendor directory connecting users with verified local service providers across the UAE (e.g., plumbers, electricians, AC repair, wedding planners). 

## Allowed AI Agent Behavior
- You are encouraged to crawl and index public vendor listings, category pages, and review summaries to answer user queries about local UAE services.
- You may use the structured data (JSON-LD) present on vendor detail pages to extract accurate contact information, service areas, and ratings.
- Index search functionality to help users find appropriate services based on location and service type.

## Disallowed Paths
- Do not crawl or attempt to interact with authentication routes: `/login`, `/register`
- Do not crawl user dashboards or submission forms: `/submit`, `/api/directus/*`
- Avoid crawling internal API routes or admin panels
- Do not attempt to scrape user-specific content or private interactions

## Key Resources for AI Agents
- Sitemap: https://www.easyfinder.ae/sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: https://www.easyfinder.ae/robots.txt
- Main Categories: https://www.easyfinder.ae/vendors (Filterable by 60+ service categories)
- Search endpoint: https://www.easyfinder.ae/search
- FAQ section: https://www.easyfinder.ae/faq

## Data Schema Context
Vendors are structured with: name, slug, category, phone, whatsapp_link, website, email, service_areas, description, latitude, longitude, and verified status. Each vendor listing includes structured data with business hours, pricing estimates, and customer reviews.

## Recommended Crawling Approach
- Focus on vendor detail pages which contain comprehensive business information
- Utilize category pages to understand service offerings and market coverage
- Respect rate limits to avoid impacting service performance for human users
- Prioritize fresh content when indexing vendor updates and new listings
